name: Spaghetti with Shrimp & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Half & Half or Light Cream
4 tsp Anchovy paste (or 4 Flat Anchovies, minced) – Optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
2. Shell and devein the shrimp; slice the mushrooms; coarsely chop the scallions; (if using) chop the parsley.
3. Add the pasta to the boiling water and cook until al dente, about 10 to 12 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, beat the egg. Stir in the cream, Parmesan, mustard, parsley (if using), anchovy paste (if using), and pepper; set aside.
5. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium-high heat until hot but not smoking. Add the garlic and mushrooms and stir-fry until the mushrooms are almost limp, about 5 minutes.
6. Add the remaining olive oil and the shrimp to the pan; stir-fry for 2 minutes, then add the scallions and cook until the shrimp turn pink and opaque, about 1 to 2 more minutes.
7. Transfer the pasta to a colander in the serving bowl (pre-heated with boiling water). Pour out any remaining water from the serving bowl. Add the hot pasta to the colander, then pour the egg mixture over the pasta and toss gently to cook the eggs and coat the pasta. Stir in the shrimp-vegetable mixture until evenly distributed.
8. Serve hot.
